sourcesContent:
import '../styles/projects.css' /* ─── Projects ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Layout • First project → "featured" card — spans full width • Remaining 3 → regular 2-col grid cards Each card has: number watermark | title | description | tech pills | links ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const PROJECTS = [ { id: '01', title: 'E-Commerce Platform', description: 'A full-stack e-commerce application with product listings, cart management, ' + 'JWT-based authentication, order tracking, and an admin dashboard.', tech: ['React', 'Node.js', 'MongoDB', 'Express', 'JWT'], github: 'https://github.com/yourusername/ecommerce', live: 'https://your-ecommerce.vercel.app', featured: true, }, { id: '02', title: 'Task Management App', description: 'A Kanban-style task manager with drag-and-drop, priority labels, ' + 'deadlines, and real-time collaboration via Firebase.', tech: ['React', 'Firebase', 'CSS'], github: 'https://github.com/yourusername/taskmanager', live: 'https://your-tasks.vercel.app', featured: false, }, { id: '03', title: 'Portfolio Website', description: 'This personal portfolio built with React.js featuring smooth section ' + 'transitions, responsive layout, and a modern dark design system.', tech: ['React', 'CSS', 'Vercel'], github: 'https://github.com/yourusername/portfolio', live: 'https://yourname.vercel.app', featured: false, }, { id: '04', title: 'Weather Dashboard', description: 'Real-time weather app using OpenWeather API with city search, ' + '5-day forecasts, and a clean Chart.js data visualization.', tech: ['React', 'REST API', 'Chart.js'], github: 'https://github.com/yourusername/weather', live: 'https://your-weather.vercel.app', featured: false, }, ] /* ── Icon helpers ─────────────────────────────── */ const GithubIcon = () => ( ) const ExternalIcon = () => ( ) /* ── Project Card ─────────────────────────────── */ const ProjectCard = ({ project }) => (
{/* Watermark number */} {project.id}

{project.title}

{project.description}

{project.tech.map(t => ( {t} ))}
Code Live Demo
) /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */ const Projects = () => (
My Work

Featured Projects

Projects I've built to sharpen skills and solve real problems

{PROJECTS.map(p => )}
View All on GitHub
) export default Projects
